pi_items.source: Verification that all keywords are relevant to Pentavalent 3rd dose (Penta-3) immunization coverage indicators used in Sierra Leone's health system, as confirmed through WHO research and DHIS2 documentation.
DHIS2 Maps application documentation confirms support for multiple layer types including thematic layers and facility layers, enabling creation of multi-layer visualizations.

All keywords verified as standard immunization-related indicators: Penta (Pentavalent vaccine), DPT (Diphtheria-Pertussis-Tetanus component), BCG (Bacillus Calmette-Guérin vaccine), Measles (common immunization indicator). Sierra Leone health studies confirm collection of these specific indicators in DHIS2.

Environment configuration (env.json) defines user 'ga' as the primary user account with standard bash shell and home directory. Downloads directory is created during task setup (setup_task.sh line 38).
HTTP HEAD request confirmed URL returns HTTP 200, content-type application/sql, 85463283 bytes, last-modified 2026-01-08. Hosted on official DHIS2 databases repository (Amazon S3/CloudFront).
HTTP HEAD request confirmed URL returns HTTP 200, content-type application/sql, 85463286 bytes, last-modified 2026-02-10. Hosted on official DHIS2 databases repository.

pi_items.metadata_value: Official DHIS2 demo database with real-world health data
pi_items.verified_value: Real-world data from Sierra Leone DHIS2 implementation provided by DHIS2 project
pi_items.source: Setup script (setup_dhis2.sh line 83) explicitly states 'This is official real-world demo data from the DHIS2 project.' Documentation at dhis2.org/demo confirms Sierra Leone database contains data from actual DHIS2 implementation in Sierra Leone. Research literature (Countdown2030, WHO studies) references immunization data extracted from Sierra Leone DHIS2 database.

pi_items.metadata_value: National EPI Manager for Sierra Leone
pi_items.verified_value: National EPI Manager is a real role in Sierra Leone's Ministry of Health and Sanitation
pi_items.source: Verified through WHO job postings and Sierra Leone Ministry of Health documentation. The role is the head of the Expanded Programme on Immunization (EPI), responsible for vaccination programs across Sierra Leone districts.

pi_items.verified_value: Penta-3 is pentavalent vaccine (DPT+Hepatitis B+Hib) 3rd dose, administered at 14 weeks, standard immunization indicator in Sierra Leone
pi_items.source: Confirmed through peer-reviewed research (JOGH 2022, PMC studies) and WHO Regional Office for Africa reports. Sierra Leone household surveys (2019) documented Penta-3 coverage ranging 69-92% across districts.

privileged_info_summary: The multi_layer_health_map task uses real official DHIS2 demo data from Sierra Leone downloaded from https://databases.dhis2.org (HTTP-verified as available, ~85GB PostgreSQL database). The data contains actual health information including immunization indicators (Penta-3, BCG, Measles) collected by Sierra Leone's health system. The task requires creating a DHIS2 map with multiple layers showing Penta-3 (Pentavalent 3rd dose) coverage by district for 2023, with a contextual second layer (facility locations or alternative indicator). The metadata keywords (penta, immunization, coverage, epi, dpt, vaccine, bcg, measles) are all verified as relevant to Sierra Leone's documented immunization indicators. The download directory /home/ga/Downloads is the standard user directory configured in the environment. All task requirements and technical constraints are grounded in real-world DHIS2 system capabilities and Sierra Leone health data.
